name: vidrush-render-worker
description: VidRush render worker — ffmpeg tier-1 renderer behind an HTTP endpoint, deployed to Fly.io. Keeps heavy renders off Vercel serverless.

scripts.sync:engine: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for(const n of ['render','voice','music']){const s='../app-live/lib/engine/'+n+'.ts',d='src/'+n+'.ts';fs.writeFileSync(d,'// VENDORED from app-live/lib/engine/'+n+'.ts — regenerate with: npm run sync:engine. Do not edit here.\n'+fs.readFileSync(s,'utf8'))}"
